tool.name: get_auth_config
tool.description: Check whether public registration is currently open on this lmodulo instance.

tool.name: register_user
tool.description: Register a new user account. The first user to register receives the admin role; all subsequent users receive the customer role. Registration must be open (check get_auth_config first).

email.description: Unique email address used for login and password reset

tool.name: login
tool.description: Authenticate with email and password. Sets a session cookie on success. Staff are redirected to /dashboard; customers to /.

tool.name: logout
tool.description: Destroy the current session and clear the session cookie.

tool.name: get_current_user
tool.description: Get the currently authenticated user's profile, role, and full permissions array.

tool.name: update_profile
tool.description: Update the current user's username, email, name, or avatar color.

avatarColor.description: CSS hex color for the initials avatar background

tool.name: upload_avatar
tool.description: Upload a profile picture (multipart). Replaces the initials avatar. Returns the updated avatar URL.

tool.name: delete_avatar
tool.description: Remove the current user's profile picture, reverting to the initials avatar display.

tool.name: forgot_password
tool.description: Request a password reset email. Sends a reset link to the given email address if an account exists.

tool.name: reset_password
tool.description: Set a new password using a single-use reset token received by email.

token.description: Reset token from the email link

tool.name: list_users
tool.description: List all non-customer users. Requires users.read permission.

tool.name: create_user
tool.description: Admin creates a new team member without requiring self-registration. New users default to the viewer role. Requires users.create permission.

tool.name: update_user
tool.description: Update a user's profile fields. Requires users.update permission.

tool.name: delete_user
tool.description: Permanently remove a user and their session. Content they created remains in the database. Requires users.delete permission.

tool.name: assign_user_role
tool.description: Assign a new role to a user. Role change takes effect on the user's next login. Requires users.update permission.

tool.name: list_roles
tool.description: List all roles with their permissions arrays. Requires roles.read permission.

tool.name: create_role
tool.description: Create a new custom role with any combination of resource/action permissions. Requires roles.create permission.

tool.name: get_role
tool.description: Get a single role by its ID, including its full permissions array.

tool.name: update_role
tool.description: Update a role's label or permissions array. Requires roles.update permission.

tool.name: list_settings
tool.description: List all application settings as key-value pairs. Requires settings.read permission.

tool.name: get_brand_settings
tool.description: Get brand name and logo URL. Public endpoint — used in the nav before login.

tool.name: update_setting
tool.description: Update any application setting by key. Common keys: brand.name, app.registration_open, chat.enabled, theme.mode. Requires settings.update permission.

key.description: Setting key, e.g. brand.name, app.registration_open, chat.enabled, theme.mode

tool.name: upload_brand_logo
tool.description: Upload a brand logo image (multipart PNG or SVG). Saves to MinIO and returns the URL. Requires settings.update permission.

tool.name: list_inbox
tool.description: Get the current user's inbox: all non-archived, non-deleted threads where they are a recipient, in reverse chronological order.

tool.name: get_unread_message_count
tool.description: Get the count of unread message threads for the current user. Used to populate the unread badge in the sidebar.

tool.name: send_message
tool.description: Send a new in-app message to one or more recipients, creating a new thread.

tool.name: get_message_thread
tool.description: Get all messages in a thread in chronological order. Also marks the thread as read for the current user.

tool.name: reply_to_message
tool.description: Reply to an existing message thread.

tool.name: archive_message_thread
tool.description: Move a message thread to the archive, removing it from the inbox.

tool.name: delete_message_thread
tool.description: Soft-delete a message thread, removing it from the current user's inbox without deleting it for other recipients.

tool.name: list_milestones
tool.description: List agile milestones with optional filters. Returns rollup stats (completion %, sprint counts, etc.). Requires agile_milestones:read.

tool.name: create_milestone
tool.description: Create a new agile milestone, the top-level container in the hierarchy (Milestone → Sprint → Job → Task). Requires agile_milestones:create.

strategicGoal.description: The business objective this milestone advances

tool.name: get_milestone
tool.description: Get a single milestone with aggregated sprint, job, and task counts. Requires agile_milestones:read.

tool.name: update_milestone
tool.description: Update any field on an existing milestone. Requires agile_milestones:update.

tool.name: delete_milestone
tool.description: Delete a milestone and all its child sprints, jobs, tasks, and comments. Requires agile_milestones:delete.

tool.name: list_sprints
tool.description: List sprints, optionally filtered by milestone. Returns velocity, commitment, and completion percentage. Requires agile_sprints:read.

tool.name: create_sprint
tool.description: Create a new sprint within a milestone. Sprint number auto-increments within the milestone. Requires agile_sprints:create.

capacity.description: Available team hours for this sprint

tool.name: get_sprint
tool.description: Get full sprint detail including jobs and tasks. Requires agile_sprints:read.

tool.name: update_sprint
tool.description: Update sprint fields. Requires agile_sprints:update.

tool.name: delete_sprint
tool.description: Delete a sprint and all its child jobs, tasks, and comments. Requires agile_sprints:delete.

tool.name: list_jobs
tool.description: List jobs with filters. Requires agile_jobs:read.

tool.name: create_job
tool.description: Create a new job (user story / feature ticket) within a sprint. Validates no circular dependencies. Requires agile_jobs:create.

dependencyIds.description: IDs of jobs that must complete before this one

tool.name: get_job
tool.description: Get full job detail including tasks, comments, attachments, and dependency list. Requires agile_jobs:read.

tool.name: update_job
tool.description: Update a job's fields. Re-validates dependency graph on change. Requires agile_jobs:update.

tool.name: delete_job
tool.description: Delete a job and its tasks and comments. Requires agile_jobs:delete.

tool.name: list_tasks
tool.description: List tasks with filters. Requires agile_tasks:read.

tool.name: create_task
tool.description: Create a new task within a job. assignedTo is required when status is 'In Progress'. blockedReason is required when status is 'Blocked'. Requires agile_tasks:create.

assignedTo.description: User ID — required if status is In Progress

tool.name: get_task
tool.description: Get full task detail. Requires agile_tasks:read.

tool.name: update_task
tool.description: Update task fields. Same validation rules as create (assignedTo required for In Progress, blockedReason required for Blocked). Requires agile_tasks:update.

tool.name: delete_task
tool.description: Delete a task. Requires agile_tasks:delete.

tool.name: list_job_comments
tool.description: Get chronological list of comments on a job. Requires agile_comments:read.

tool.name: add_job_comment
tool.description: Add a comment to a job. Requires agile_comments:create.

tool.name: edit_job_comment
tool.description: Edit a comment. Only the author or an admin can edit. Requires agile_comments:update.

tool.name: delete_job_comment
tool.description: Delete a job comment. Requires agile_comments:delete.

tool.name: list_calendar_events
tool.description: List calendar events with optional date range and type filters. Requires calendar_events:read.

tool.name: create_calendar_event
tool.description: Create a new calendar event. Requires calendar_events:create.

endDate.description: Defaults to startDate for single-day events

allDay.description: Hides time display in the calendar

sharedWith.description: Array of user IDs who can see this event in their personal calendar

tool.name: get_calendar_event
tool.description: Get a single calendar event's detail. Requires calendar_events:read.

tool.name: update_calendar_event
tool.description: Update calendar event fields. Requires calendar_events:update.

tool.name: delete_calendar_event
tool.description: Delete a calendar event. Requires calendar_events:delete (admin and owner only).

tool.name: get_calendar_subscriptions
tool.description: Get the current user's reminder subscription settings for each event type.

tool.name: update_calendar_subscriptions
tool.description: Update reminder preferences — which event types trigger emails and how far in advance.

preferences.description: Map of eventType to reminder settings, e.g. { standup: { enabled: true, leadTimeHours: 1 } }

tool.name: list_crm_contacts
tool.description: List CRM contacts with filters. Requires crm_contacts:read.

tool.name: create_crm_contact
tool.description: Create a new CRM contact. Requires crm_contacts:create.

email.description: Globally unique — optional but must be unique when present

tool.name: get_crm_contact
tool.description: Get a single CRM contact with company name joined. Requires crm_contacts:read.

tool.name: update_crm_contact
tool.description: Partial update of a CRM contact. Requires crm_contacts:update.

tool.name: delete_crm_contact
tool.description: Delete a CRM contact. Requires crm_contacts:delete.

tool.name: list_crm_companies
tool.description: List CRM companies with health score computed. Supports search, type, and industry filters. Requires crm_companies:read.

tool.name: create_crm_company
tool.description: Create a new CRM company. Requires crm_companies:create.

domain.description: e.g. acme.com — must be globally unique

tool.name: get_crm_company
tool.description: Get a single CRM company with computed health score and deal count. Requires crm_companies:read.

tool.name: update_crm_company
tool.description: Partial update of a CRM company. Requires crm_companies:update.

tool.name: delete_crm_company
tool.description: Delete a CRM company. Requires crm_companies:delete.

tool.name: list_crm_deals
tool.description: List CRM deals with filters. Requires crm_deals:read.

tool.name: create_crm_deal
tool.description: Create a new CRM deal. Probability is auto-set from stage unless explicitly overridden. Requires crm_deals:create.

lostReason.description: Required when stage is Closed Lost

tool.name: get_crm_deal
tool.description: Get a single CRM deal with company name joined. Requires crm_deals:read.

tool.name: update_crm_deal
tool.description: Partial update of a CRM deal. Stage change auto-updates probability. lostReason is required when moving to Closed Lost. Requires crm_deals:update.

lostReason.description: Required if moving to Closed Lost

tool.name: delete_crm_deal
tool.description: Delete a CRM deal. Requires crm_deals:delete.

tool.name: list_crm_activities
tool.description: List CRM activities with filters. Requires crm_activities:read.

tool.name: create_crm_activity
tool.description: Log a new CRM activity (call, email, meeting, demo, note, or task) linked to a company, contact, or deal. Requires crm_activities:create.

assignedTo.description: User ID responsible for completing it

tool.name: update_crm_activity
tool.description: Update a CRM activity. Send completedAt to mark it complete. Requires crm_activities:update.

completedAt.description: Set to mark the activity as complete

tool.name: delete_crm_activity
tool.description: Delete a CRM activity. Requires crm_activities:delete.

tool.name: convert_contact_to_client
tool.description: Convert a CRM contact to a billing customer. Creates a user account with role 'customer', sends a password-set email to the contact's email address, and sends an in-app welcome message from the first owner/admin. Requires crm_contacts:update.

tool.name: list_invoices
tool.description: List invoices. Customers are automatically scoped to their own invoices. Supports status filter tabs and sorting. Requires authentication.

subscriptionId.description: Filter to invoices generated by a specific subscription

tool.name: create_invoice
tool.description: Create a new invoice. Include a recurrence field to make it a recurring template that auto-generates draft copies on the configured schedule. Invoice numbers are auto-assigned (INV-0001 format). Requires finance_invoices:create.

recurrence.description: Include to make this a recurring template

tool.name: get_invoice
tool.description: Get a single invoice with line items, tax breakdown, totals, and recurrence info. Customers can only access their own invoices. Requires authentication.

tool.name: update_invoice
tool.description: Partial update of an invoice. Include recurrence field to enable, disable, or change the recurrence schedule. Requires finance_invoices:update.

recurrence.description: Set enabled: false to disable recurrence, or update frequency/nextDate

tool.name: delete_invoice
tool.description: Delete an invoice. Requires finance_invoices:delete.

tool.name: pay_invoice
tool.description: Initiate a Stripe payment for an invoice. Creates a PaymentIntent and returns the clientSecret for mounting Stripe Elements in the browser. Returns 503 if STRIPE_SECRET_KEY is not configured. Requires authentication.

tool.name: list_subscriptions
tool.description: List billing subscription plans. Customers are automatically scoped to their own subscriptions. Requires finance_subscriptions:read.

tool.name: create_subscription
tool.description: Create a new billing subscription plan. nextBillingDate is automatically computed from startDate + billingCycle. The subscription starts generating draft invoices immediately if startDate is today or in the past. Requires finance_subscriptions:create.

endDate.description: Optional — subscription auto-cancels when next cycle would exceed this

dueDateOffsetDays.description: Days after billing date to set dueDate on generated invoices

tool.name: get_subscription
tool.description: Get a single subscription with its line items, billing metadata, and generated invoices. Requires finance_subscriptions:read.

tool.name: update_subscription
tool.description: Update a subscription. Send { status: 'paused' } to pause, { status: 'active' } to resume, { status: 'cancelled' } to cancel. Can also update line items, tax rate, or billing cycle. Requires finance_subscriptions:update.

tool.name: delete_subscription
tool.description: Delete a subscription plan. Does not delete invoices that were already generated by this subscription. Requires finance_subscriptions:delete.

tool.name: list_billing_customers
tool.description: List all users with the 'customer' role, with their associated company name joined. Used to populate customer selectors in invoice and subscription creation forms. Requires users:read.

tool.name: check_api_health
tool.description: Check whether the Fastify API is reachable. Returns 200 OK when healthy. Used by Docker healthcheck.
